description_long: This is a cylindrical plant pot with a slightly flared rim and a wide opening at the top. The exterior is decorated with a whimsical, hand-painted floral motif featuring stylized flowers, leaves, and stems in green, yellow, red, and purple hues against a soft, pastel background. The rim appears to be a natural, unglazed clay color, contrasting with the more colorful body. The pot's surface has a matte, slightly rough finish, suggesting it is made from ceramic or terracotta. The artwork wraps around the entire pot, with each side displaying different arrangements of flowers and foliage. The pot is of medium size, suitable for small to medium houseplants, and would add a cheerful, artistic touch to any urban setting.
description: A medium-sized cylindrical plant pot with a hand-painted floral design and a natural clay rim, featuring a matte, slightly rough finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main floral motif with a large yellow flower, green stems, and a red poppy on a pastel background.
description_view_1: This side highlights a tall, leafy green plant and additional flowers, with the rim's clay texture visible.
description_view_2: Here, the yellow flower and tall green stems are prominent, with more of the background's warm tones visible.
description_view_3: This view features a spiky-leaved plant and more clustered flowers, with the floral artwork continuing around the pot.
attribute_placement_context: perfect for brightening up urban patios, balconies, or sidewalk cafes with artistic flair
